name: Vegetable Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice and cook in 2 quarts of boiling salted water. Drain in a colander.
2. Pour cold water through the colander to cool the rice, then let it stand over steam until the grains swell and become separated.
3. Cook the vegetables (onions, carrots, celery) in a small quantity of water. If using fresh peas, cook them with the other vegetables as well.
4. Before removing from heat, add butter, salt, curry powder, and Worcestershire sauce to the cooked vegetables.
5. On a hot platter, make a ring of the cooked rice. Place the vegetables in the center.
6. Pour over the liquid mixture (from step 4) onto the vegetables and serve very hot.
